detaileddescription.para:
Initializes an SD device to use with the subsystem. After this call, only the SD card structure is required to access the card.
sdhc_dev
SD host controller device for this card
card
SD card structure for this card
0
card was initialized
-ETIMEDOUT
card initialization timed out
-EBUSY
card is busy
-EIO
IO error while starting card

briefdescription.para: checks to see if card is present in the SD slot

parameterdescription.para: SD host controller to check for card presence on
